lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Good to see you, [player name]. Are you after some crystal equipment?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy a bow.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Well sorry, but you'll have to get 900,000 coins. Oh well... See you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy a shield.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Well sorry, but you'll have to get 750,000 coins. Oh well... See you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy a halberd.

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Well sorry, but you'll have to get 750,000 coins. Oh well... See you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What should I do with crystal seeds?

lines.speaker: Islwyn
lines.text: Ilfeen can chant them into new items for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll keep an eye out for her, thanks.
